title: std::out_of_range crash in Verilog backend after alumacc pass

features.name: arithmetic cells with interlocked add/sub output-input chaining
features.description: Code should include a $add cell whose output wire feeds back as input to a $sub cell, creating interlocked arithmetic operations
features.snippet:
cell $add $add$753
  parameter \A_SIGNED 0 \A_WIDTH 2 \B_SIGNED 0 \B_WIDTH 2 \Y_WIDTH 2
  connect \A $sub_Y
  connect \Y $auto$bugpoint.cc:258:simplify_something$928
end
cell $sub $sub$752
  parameter \A_SIGNED 0 \A_WIDTH 2 \B_SIGNED 0 \B_WIDTH 2 \Y_WIDTH 2
  connect \A $auto$bugpoint.cc:258:simplify_something$923
  connect \Y $sub_Y
end

features.name: alumacc pass followed by write_verilog on arithmetic design
features.description: Code should include an RTLIL design with $add and $sub cells that is first processed by the alumacc pass then output via write_verilog backend
